response.justification: An experienced, versatile senior engineer (~15 years) with strong fundamentals in distributed systems, high-throughput services, multi-threading/async (DLang fibers, async I/O), TDD, and CI/CD. However, the role centers on hands-on C++/STL development with 8–12 years of C++ depth, plus industrial-automation security (IEC 62443/SDL) and protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA). The candidate's C++ exposure is limited and dated (~6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a thesis project), with no industrial-cybersecurity or IoT-protocol background. Transferable architecture and concurrency skills exist, but the core C++ and domain requirements are largely unmet.
strengths: Strong concurrency/low-latency experience (async I/O, fibers, high-throughput microservices)
Senior-level architecture, TDD, and CI/CD craftsmanship across many stacks
Proven ownership: founded and runs an event-driven, Kubernetes-deployable platform
concerns: C++/STL experience is minimal and dated (~6 months, 2014–2015); no recent depth
No industrial-automation, IEC 62443/SDL, or secure-coding-standard background
Missing required protocol/middleware experience (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, message brokers)
